notes: Add or edit lines inside any condition array. The desk pet selects from active conditions based on time on page, weather, and gentle wellness reminders.

conditionGuide.sedentary_long: Shown after the user has been on the site for a long session.
conditionGuide.cold_weather: Shown when the live weather temperature is cold.
conditionGuide.mosquito_care: Shown on rainy evenings or warm night conditions.
conditionGuide.relax_break: Shown when the user may need a calm reset.
conditionGuide.music_boost: Shown as a light mood boost reminder.
conditionGuide.kindness_love: Shown as a gentle self-care fallback.
conditionGuide.hydration_break: Shown when the user may need water or a reset.
conditionGuide.posture_check: Shown after longer screen posture time.
conditionGuide.rainy_weather: Shown when the weather is rainy, foggy, or stormy.
